pi_items.source: Verified in setup_task.sh lines 10-11, export_result.sh line 11, and task description in task.json
Alert name 'Structural Crack - Desk Frame' created in setup_task.sh line 33; export_result.sh searches for '*Structural*' pattern (line 25); verifier.py checks for 'structural' keyword (line 67)
export_result.sh line 25 searches for '*Quality*' as alternative pattern; verifier.py line 70 accepts 'quality alert' as fallback filename pattern

privileged_info_summary: The task requires generating a PDF report for a quality alert named 'Structural Crack - Desk Frame' in an Odoo 17 instance running on localhost:8069. The PDF must be downloaded to /home/ga/Downloads directory. The expected filename contains 'Structural Crack' pattern, with fallback acceptance of 'Quality Alert' generic pattern. All data is synthetically created via XML-RPC during task setup. The task environment uses Docker containers (Odoo 17 + PostgreSQL 15), Firefox for browser interaction, and validates PDF generation within a 180-second timeout limit.
